topic: Can chemistry predict which perfume will become a bestseller?

seo_titles: Can You Master Perfume in One Day?
Why Most Beginners Fail at Perfume Blending
The Fastest Way to Learn Perfume Basics
story_angles: Question — can chemistry and data predict which perfume becomes a bestseller?
Mechanism — compare formulation science, consumer testing, market signals, and brand launch evidence.
Takeaway — what prediction models get right and what branding still decides.
